title: SEC0: clamp total_chunks to prevent OOM on malicious FileHeader
description: FileHeader receive handler does vec![None; total_chunks as usize] with no upper bound. A peer can send total_chunks=u32::MAX causing ~16 GB allocation. Fix: validate total_chunks <= FILE_MAX_CHUNKS before inserting. FILE_MAX_CHUNKS = ceil(FILE_MAX_BYTES / CHUNK_SIZE) + 1 = ceil(10MB / 45KB) + 1 = 229. Reject with warn!() if exceeded.
close_reason: Fixed: total_chunks bounded to FILE_MAX_CHUNKS=230; rejects out-of-range values with warn!()
